creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
As the first stage of de-duplication, I manually merged all freebsd-NNN@FreeBSD.org users that were obvious typos during responsible changes, cross-referencing with GNATS database to check who was the actual assignee.  

freebsd-anholt@FreeBSD.org => anholt@FreeBSD.org
freebsd-x22@FreeBSD.org => freebsd-x11@FreeBSD.org
freebsd-x1@FreeBSD.org => freebsd-x11@FreeBSD.org
